description: Fragment from the lower right corner of an agreement between a husband, Abū ʿAlī Yefet b. Yeshuʿa ha-Kohen, and wife, Sitt al-Ḍiyāʾ. The text is fragmentary but is seems that the husband takes upon himself to travel before he will have a child. Written by Halfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–1138 CE) under the authority of Masliah Gaon (r. 1127–1139). Dating: 1127–38 CE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
